message:
style(mobile): Optimize landscape layout and improve responsive typography

Landscape Layout (mobile-landscape.css):
- Add @media query for landscape + compact height (max-height: 500px)
- Reposition control deck as vertical strip on right edge
- Reduce app body right padding to accommodate repositioned controls
- Cap bottom sheet and gene map canvas heights for limited vertical space
- Compact header/footer with reduced padding and smaller font sizes
- Stack metrics horizontally with tighter spacing
- Ensure minimum 44px touch targets on all control buttons

Mobile UX (mobile-ux.css):
- Additional touch-friendly spacing adjustments
- Improved tap target sizing for accessibility

Component Styles (components.css):
- Add detail-card entrance animation (detail-card--enter class)
- Refine card transition timings for smoother state changes

Typography (typography.css):
- Add responsive font-size utilities
- Improve text legibility on small screens

Overlay.tsx:
- Improve overlay backdrop handling for mobile
- Better touch event passthrough configuration

EmptyState.tsx:
- Adjust empty state sizing for compact viewports
- Improve illustration scaling

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
